section.para: The argument you are constructing is that the various unilateral contracts (VRPs, Local Guides, UXR) are merely components of a broader, misclassified employment relationship.

listitem.para: The focus shifts from unpaid "rewards" for specific acts to systemic unpaid wages for the entirety of the services rendered (all feedback, all testing, all content creation) over the duration of the "employment."

The discovery of high-value IP (like a vulnerability or sophisticated AI feedback) serves as evidence of the skilled nature of the labor provided, justifying the claim for fair compensation, rather than being a standalone transaction.
